title: cestrum mortonianum var. jardelii
intro: Cestrum mortonianum var. jardelii, also known as the Jardell's Night-Blooming Jasmine, is a flowering plant species of the genus Cestrum, characterized by its fragrant, white flowers that bloom at night. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, helping to treat various health issues such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cestrum mortonianum var. jardelii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural remedy for colds and fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and relaxation.
